summary: Statistics (Statistiche) feature testing complete - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs for /api/stats/* returning real data from API-Football. Frontend Statistics tab fully functional with league selector, sub-tabs, and real-time standings/results/fixtures data.

issues: Tab shows 'Statistics' (English) instead of 'Statistiche' (Italian) - translation key uses English fallback. The i18n key tabs.statistics defaults to 'Statistiche' but the app shows English. Minor localization issue.

GET /api/stats/leagues.details: Returns 5 leagues (Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Ligue 1) with league_id, name, country, logo, current_season

GET /api/stats/standings/{league_id}.details: Returns full standings table with rank, team_name, team_logo, points, played, win, draw, lose, goal_diff - tested for all 5 leagues

GET /api/stats/results/{league_id}.details: Returns recent finished fixtures with home/away teams, goals, dates

GET /api/stats/upcoming/{league_id}.details: Returns upcoming fixtures with home/away teams, dates

Authentication required.details: All stats endpoints return 401/403 when no auth token provided

5_tabs_in_bottom_bar.details: Home, Statistics, Predictions, Rankings, Profile - all 5 tabs visible and clickable

statistics_tab_navigation.details: Clicking Statistics tab navigates to /statistics page

league_chips_display.details: All 5 league chips visible: Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Ligue 1

sub_tabs_display.details: All 3 sub-tabs visible: Standings, Results, Upcoming

standings_data_loads.details: Serie A standings shows all 20 teams with points, W/D/L, goal diff

results_data_loads.details: Recent results shown grouped by matchday with scores

upcoming_data_loads.details: Upcoming fixtures shown with dates and times

league_switching.details: Clicking Premier League chip loads PL standings correctly

home_no_classifiche.details: CLASSIFICHE section correctly removed from Home page

action_items: MINOR: Tab label shows 'Statistics' instead of 'Statistiche' - check i18n language detection in _layout.tsx
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: stats_router endpoints correctly use APIFootballClient with caching (TTL 5-15 min)
Frontend: statistics.tsx properly uses useAuth for token and apiCall for authenticated requests
Tab layout (_layout.tsx) correctly includes statistics tab between home and predictions
Home.tsx correctly removed rankings_preview section as requested
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statistics feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses API-Football integration with caching. Frontend has 5-tab bottom bar with Statistics between Home and Predictions. All CRUD flows for standings/results/upcoming work correctly. Minor issue: tab label shows English 'Statistics' instead of Italian 'Statistiche'.
